# Mathematical status

<!-- Generated by scripts/render_status.py from MATH_STATUS.json; do not edit. -->

[`MATH_STATUS.json`](MATH_STATUS.json) is the sole status authority. Canonical sources contain the proofs; this page records their scope and dependency role. A checker establishes reproducibility, not external review.

## Core theorem chain

| ID | Result | Scope | Source | Dependencies | Checker | Review |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| F1 | Foundational Keller collision | A concrete Keller map with the asserted collision and noninjectivity properties. | [source](verified/FOUNDATIONAL_GEOMETRY.md) | — | [checker](scripts/verify_counterexample_independent.py) | formalized |
| W1 | Tangent-map core and weighted suspension | Every polynomial core and admissible weighted seed; inverse pencil, Jacobian/critical divisor, discriminant normalization, Hessian Fitting divisor, incidence normal form, and suspension comparison. | [source](verified/TANGENT_MAP_CORE.md) | `F1` | [checker](scripts/verify_weighted_seed_theorem.py) | none |
| S1 | Stable normalization functoriality | Polynomial stabilization preserves normalization, boundary primes and (e,f), scheme intersections and nilpotency indices, Fitting ideals, node pairings, and conductors. | [source](verified/STABLE_NORMALIZATION_FUNCTORIALITY.md) | — | — | none |
| C1 | Cancellation construction | All cancellation parameters m,r: universal Jacobian, polynomiality criterion, unique parameter-root jet, reconstruction degree, and symbolic collision. | [source](cancellation/CONSTRUCTION.md) | — | [checker](scripts/verify_master_universal.py) | none |
| B1 | Complete canonical boundary exhaustion | The complete codimension-one canonical boundary list for the cancellation construction. | [source](papers/marked-root-multiplicity/boundary-exhaustion.tex) | `W1`, `C1` | [checker](scripts/audit_boundary_exhaustion_independent.py) | none |
| P1 | Cancellation reconstruction residue and parameter faithfulness | The marked reconstruction open; the cancellation reconstruction residue q is invariant and separates parameter roots. | [source](papers/marked-root-multiplicity/cancellation-parameter-faithfulness.tex) | `B1`, `C1`, `S1`, `T1` | [checker](scripts/verify_cancellation_parameter_faithfulness.py) | none |
| M1 | Degreewise finite count | Every fixed degree N in the stated cancellation family; finite stable multiplicity from boundary data, thick contact, and parameter-root counting. | [source](papers/marked-root-multiplicity/main.tex) | `B1`, `S1`, `T1`, `P1` | [checker](scripts/verify_degreewise_multiplicity_count.py) | none |
| D1 | Decorated-normalization moduli | The coarse decorated normalization has stable-moduli dimension N-3; its generic map has exact degree N-2. | [source](papers/decorated-discriminant-normalization/main.tex) | `S1`, `W1` | [checker](scripts/verify_decorated_normalization.py) | none |
| F2 | Generic affine-mark faithfulness and marked normalization | On the ordinary boundary-clean open, decorated normalization plus one affine root sheet recovers the seed exactly; after shrinking, the seed open normalizes the marked image and forgetting the sheet is finite étale of degree N-2. | [source](papers/decorated-discriminant-normalization/main.tex) | `D1`, `S1`, `W1` | [checker](scripts/verify_generic_affine_mark_faithfulness.py) | none |
| H1 | Hurwitz--LL compactification of rerooting | Internal admissible-cover/Hurwitz--LL compactification theorem; repository proof is complete but externally unreviewed. | [source](papers/hurwitz-ll-rerooting/main.tex) | external: admissible-cover compactification technology | [checker](scripts/verify_restricted_ll_degree.py) | none |
| R1 | All-degree rank-two residue and symplectic descent | All degrees in the rank-two residue construction, including uniform generic/exceptional charts and symplectic descent. | [source](extended-geometry/RANK_TWO_SYMPLECTIC_DESCENT.md) | `W1`, `D1` | [checker](scripts/verify_four_residue_recurrence.py) | none |
| R2 | Rank-two parameter faithfulness | The ordinary boundary-clean open in every degree; the affine root mark separates the rank-two parameters. | [source](extended-geometry/RANK_TWO_SYMPLECTIC_DESCENT.md) | `R1`, `F2` | [checker](scripts/verify_generic_affine_mark_faithfulness.py) | none |

## Derived corollaries

| ID | Result | Scope | Source | Dependencies | Checker | Review |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| T1 | Unconditional cancellation thick contact | All m,r thick contacts, with exact scheme intersection and nilpotency index. | [source](papers/marked-root-multiplicity/thick-intersection.tex) | `B1`, `C1` | [checker](scripts/audit_thick_intersection_local.py) | none |
| O1 | Formal orbit triviality | Finite-order deformations modulo unrestricted polynomial source automorphisms are formally orbit-trivial. | [source](extended-geometry/FORMAL_ORBIT_TRIVIALITY.md) | — | [checker](scripts/verify_formal_orbit_triviality.py) | none |
| G1 | Generic nodal-cuspidal discriminant geometry | proved on a nonempty open of normalized admissible degree-n seeds for every n >= 3 | [source](extended-geometry/GENERIC_DISCRIMINANT_CURVE.md) | `W1` | [checker](scripts/verify_generic_discriminant_geometry.py) | none |
| UM1 | Universal symmetric monodromy | Every characteristic-zero polynomial H of degree n >= 2: Gal(H(W)-sW+t/k(s,t)) and its geometric monodromy group are S_n; for n >= 3 the generic inverse cover has trivial deck group. | [source](verified/WEIGHTED_SEED_THEOREM.md) | `W1`, external: Zariski--Nagata purity and triviality of finite etale covers of affine space | [checker](scripts/verify_weighted_seed_theorem.py) | none |
| GD1 | Exact geometric-degree spectrum | The geometric degrees of noninvertible Keller maps A^3_C -> A^3_C are exactly 3,4,5,...; maps of different degrees are stably polynomially left--right inequivalent. | [source](verified/GEOMETRIC_DEGREE_SPECTRUM.md) | `W1`, external: birational and Galois cases of the Jacobian theorem | — | none |
| RF1 | All-degree complete rational fibers | For every N >= 3, an explicit weighted Keller map over Q has a complete fiber of exactly N distinct rational points and an open real target neighborhood with N real sheets. | [source](verified/ALL_DEGREE_RATIONAL_FIBERS.md) | `W1` | [checker](scripts/verify_all_degree_rational_fibers.py) | none |
| I1 | Canonical-family image and nonproperness | proved for H_d(W)=W^d(1-W) for every d >= 2, including the exact affine image and boundary fibers | [source](extended-geometry/CANONICAL_FAMILY_IMAGE.md) | `W1` | [checker](scripts/verify_canonical_family_image.py) | none |
| I2 | Omitted-value classification | complete finite classifier for every fixed seed, with a closed classification for primitives having two additional simple zeros | [source](extended-geometry/OMITTED_VALUE_CLASSIFICATION.md) | `W1` | [checker](scripts/verify_omitted_value_classification.py) | none |
| E1 | Full-contact strata and exceptional components | proved in characteristic zero for every full-contact partition: nonemptiness, dimensions, closure order, maximal components, normalizations, and set-theoretic intersections | [source](extended-geometry/COINCIDENT_ROOT_REBUILD.md) | `W1`, `I2` | [checker](scripts/verify_maximal_phi_irreducibility.py) | none |
| E2 | Contact-atom principle and omitted-value phase diagram | proved for every normalized exceptional seed locus in characteristic zero: maximal contact types use only multiplicities two and three, the nonsurjective locus has dimension floor(N/2)-1 and codimension floor((N-3)/2), generic quartics are exceptional, and generic seeds are surjective for every N >= 5 | [source](extended-geometry/CONTACT_ATOM_PRINCIPLE.md) | `E1` | [checker](scripts/verify_contact_atom_principle.py) | none |
| E3 | Exceptional-component normalization | proved for every maximal partition 2^a 3^b in characteristic zero, with an explicit smooth normalization | [source](extended-geometry/COMPONENT_NORMALIZATION.md) | `E1`, `E2` | [checker](scripts/verify_component_normalization.py) | none |
| E4 | Generic degree-twelve local singularity | proved etale-locally on a dense open of the (6,6) collision stratum; the two branches have transverse intersection length four | [source](extended-geometry/DEGREE12_LOCAL_SINGULARITY.md) | `E3` | [checker](scripts/audit_degree_twelve_independent.py) | none |
| FF1 | Effective finite-field Chebotarev for weighted seeds | unconditional for every admissible number-field seed outside its explicit bad ideal; every good reduction retains geometric and arithmetic S_n monodromy | [source](extended-geometry/FINITE_FIELD_CHEBOTAREV.md) | `W1`, `UM1`, external: effective finite-field Chebotarev estimates | [checker](scripts/verify_effective_chebotarev.py) | none |

| CR1 | Cancellation contact resultant | Every m>=1 for the complete resultant columns r=1,2,3,4. | [source](cancellation/CONTACT_RESULTANT.md) | `C1` | [checker](scripts/verify_contact_resultant_endpoint_reduction.py) | none |
| CR2 | Fifth cancellation contact-resultant column | Every m>=1 in the complete resultant column r=5. | [source](cancellation/CONTACT_RESULTANT.md) | `CR1` | [checker](scripts/verify_contact_resultant_r5.py) | none |
| SW1 | Exact symplectic and Weyl lifts | proved for every characteristic-zero Keller map: the polynomial cotangent lift and inverse-Jacobian Weyl embedding preserve fibers and generic degree; differential-order-preserving Weyl equivalence descends to polynomial cotangent equivalence | [source](extended-geometry/SYMPLECTIC_WEYL_LIFT.md) | `F1` | [checker](scripts/verify_symplectic_weyl_lift.py) | none |
| GS1 | Fixed-dimensional GMC to SIC to Keller invertibility | proved for every fixed r; applied contrapositively to the 21-variable cubic collision to obtain a locally complete route to not GMC(42) | [source](extended-geometry/FIXED_GMC_SIC_PROOF.md) | `LR1`, external: Derksen--van den Essen--Zhao and Zhao implication architecture | [checker](scripts/verify_fixed_gmc_sic_bridge.py) | none |

| GL1 | Constant-term Gaussian--Lagrange identity | proved coefficientwise for polynomial Phi with no restriction on Phi(0), including completed-ring, residue, determinant, and Wick normalization | [source](extended-geometry/FORMAL_GAUSSIAN_LAGRANGE_LEMMA.md) | — | [checker](scripts/verify_formal_gaussian_lagrange.py) | none |
| WG1 | Weighted-seed Gaussian bridge and finite fingerprints | proved for every nonconstant normalized seed, producing explicit four-real-Gaussian GMC counterexamples; a degree-N seed is recovered from its first N+1 mixed moments, yielding an explicit algebraic (N-3)-dimensional finitely fingerprinted family for every N >= 4 | [source](extended-geometry/WEIGHTED_GAUSSIAN_BRIDGE.md) | `GL1` | [checker](scripts/audit_weighted_gaussian_bridge_independent.py) | none |
| WI1 | Weighted invariant-coordinate Jacobian reduction | proved for arbitrary weight pattern (1,-1,-k), reducing the three-variable Jacobian to a two-invariant determinant | [source](extended-geometry/WEIGHTED_INVARIANT_JACOBIAN_REDUCTION.md) | — | [checker](scripts/verify_weighted_invariant_jacobian_reduction.py) | none |
| WT1 | Weighted tangent suspension and Poisson-square reduction | The stated plane-core setup, including the foundational pair, tangent pencil, and weighted-Wronskian cascade. | [source](extended-geometry/WEIGHTED_TANGENT_SUSPENSION.md) | `F1`, `WI1` | [checker](scripts/verify_weighted_tangent_suspension.py) | none |
| SM1 | Degreewise exact symplectic and filtered Weyl stable moduli | proved for every generic degree N >= 4: (N-3)-dimensional families of stable exact symplectic classes in A^6 and stable differential-order-preserving Weyl left-right classes in A_3, with exact seed recovery on the compatible affine-marked open; no arbitrary-Weyl inequivalence claim | [source](extended-geometry/SYMPLECTIC_STABLE_MODULI.md) | `D1`, `F2`, `SW1` | [checker](scripts/verify_symplectic_weyl_lift.py) | none |

| CF1 | Consecutive-factor contact reduction | A finite motivic classification algorithm for every consecutive row; the quadratic--cubic row is classified and the cubic--quartic row has no affine-space exception. | [source](extended-geometry/CONSECUTIVE_FACTOR_CONTACT_CLASSIFICATION.md) | `BL1` | [checker](scripts/classify_consecutive_factor_34.py) | none |
